'''Josh Rourke''' (born 27 October 1999) is a professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|fb}} for [[Wakefield Trinity]] in the [[Super League]].

He previously played for the [[Salford Red Devils]] and the [[London Broncos]] in the [[Super League]], and [[Whitehaven R.L.F.C.|Whitehaven]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]]

== Club career ==
=== Salford Red Devils ===
In September 2022 Rourke made his [[Salford Red Devils|Salford]] debut in the [[Super League]] against the [[Warrington Wolves]].<ref>[https://www.warringtonguardian.co.uk/sport/wolves/reports/20899143.salford-red-devils-14-warrington-wolves-32/ Salford Red Devils 14 Warrington Wolves 32]</ref>

===Whitehaven RLFC===
On 25 October 2022 it was announced that Rourke had signed a one-year deal with [[Whitehaven R.L.F.C.]]<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.whitehavenrl.co.uk/news/duo-confirmed-2023 |title=Duo confirmed for 2023 |website=Whitehaven RLFC |date=25 October 2022 |access-date=3 November 2022}}</ref>

===London Broncos===
On 11 December 2023 it was reported that he had signed for the [[London Broncos]] in the [[Super League]], despite him previously signing for [[Batley Bulldogs|Batley]] in the off-season.<ref>{{cite web|website=Total Rugby League|date=11 Dec 2023|title=London Broncos make sixth signing ahead of Super League 2024|url=https://www.totalrl.com/london-broncos-make-sixth-signing-ahead-of-super-league-2024/}}</ref>

===Wakefield Trinity===
On 28 September 2024, it was reported that he had signed for [[Wakefield Trinity]] on a one-year deal.<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=28 Sep 2024|author=Ben Olawumi|title=Wakefield Trinity snap up ‘outstanding’ full-back for 2025 with contract length revealed|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/wakefield-trinity-snap-up-outstanding-full-back-for-2025-with-contract-length-revealed}}</ref>
